resourceToggle.label: Enable Resource Management
resourceToggle.needService: Create at least one service before managing resources.
resourceToggle.enabledDescription: Resource management is enabled. You can create and manage bookable resources.
resourceToggle.disabledDescription: Resource management is disabled. Turn it on to view the resource table.

bookings.title: Bookings
bookings.noMerchantContext: No merchant is selected. Switch to a merchant context from the header, then reload.
bookings.searchPlaceholder: Search by customer name or contact...

business.name: Business Name
business.logoHint: Upload an image and it will be stored in the required format automatically.
business.logoUploadFailed: Failed to upload logo. Please try again.
business.descriptionText: Manage your business information visible to customers

layout.subtitle: Organized by area, with a live customer preview on the right.
layout.stickyHint: Save to apply changes. Business hours require at least one enabled day to sync.
layout.previewDescriptionFallback: Customers will see your description here.

storeProfile.description: Name, logo, description, and category shape the first impression.

contact.description: Support channels and address. Address can open a map link.
contact.mapsHint: Enter an address to generate a map link.

hours.saveHint: Exceptions save immediately; weekly hours sync when you press Save below (you can disable all days to clear hours).

financials.connectDisabled: Payment connect is not available yet; button is preview-only.
financials.paymentsEmptyBody: Connect a payment provider or add payout details so customers can pay.
financials.taxDescription: Tax ID, invoicing, and tax rate configuration.
financials.taxEmptyBody: This will ship in a future release—keep your tax ID and invoicing needs documented.
financials.deliveryDescription: Delivery radius, fees, and pickup rules.
financials.deliveryEmptyBody: If you offer delivery, you will be able to define zones and fee templates here (coming soon).

security.staffEmptyBody: Add members, assign roles, and maintain permissions on the Teams page.

advanced.themeDescription: Theme preset and color, plus announcement text as a storefront banner.
advanced.integrationsEmptyBody: Webhooks and integrations will be available in a future release.

payment.description: Configure payment methods and billing settings

notifications.localHint: These toggles are saved with your merchant customization on the server; actual push/email delivery still depends on the notifications pipeline.

cancellation.title: Cancellation Alerts
cancellation.text: Receive notifications when bookings are cancelled

dailySummary.title: Daily Summary
dailySummary.text: Receive a daily summary of bookings

team.description: Manage team members and their permissions
team.planNotice: Team management is available on Pro and Enterprise plans.

teams.title: Team Management
teams.description: Manage merchant teams and member assignments.

actions.ownerOnly: Only the merchant owner can create teams or assign members.

create.title: Create team
create.description: Teams group staff for scheduling. Choose a short unique code (letters, numbers, hyphen).
create.name: Team name

add.title: Add team member
add.description: The user must already exist and have an active membership for this merchant (e.g. accepted an invite). Enter their platform user id.
add.noTeam: Create a team first, then add members.

states.forbidden: You do not have merchant team access.
states.merchantMissing: Missing merchant context. Please switch context and try again.
states.endpointPending: Team API endpoint is not available yet. Adapter is ready for backend mapping.

bootstrap.title: Set up your merchant workspace
bootstrap.subtitle: This account does not have an active merchant tenant yet. Create one to continue.
bootstrap.forbidden: You are not allowed to create a merchant tenant.
bootstrap.loadError: Failed to load merchant bootstrap data.
bootstrap.accessForbidden: Forbidden: no merchant access for this account.

contextGate.title: Switch to a merchant context
contextGate.description: This account has merchant access, but your active context is not merchant. Switch context to continue.
contextGate.switchForbidden: You are not allowed to switch to this merchant context.
contextGate.switchError: Failed to switch context. Please try again.
